name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient client billing causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoicing and collections instead of manual invoicing and follow-ups.
problem_solved: inefficient client billing and collections process
